title: Kisses for Breakfast
writer: Kenneth Gamet, Seymour Hicks, Yves Mirande
actors: Dennis Morgan, Jane Wyatt, Shirley Ross
plot: Rodney has just married the often engaged Juliette and they are both ready to leave on their honeymoon. However, Clara showed up and Rodney sneaks out to talk to her. Clara is blackmailing Rodney, as he knew her before Juliette. C...
